mapper.update: update batch_customer set computing_power_used = computing_power_used - #{value}, computing_power_remain = computing_power_remain + #{value}, update_time = sysdate() where phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: insert into batch_computing_power_log (phone, operation_type, consume_value, remain_value, video_group_name, create_time) values (#{phone}, #{operationType}, #{consumeValue}, #{remainValue}, #{remark}, sysdate())
